positive: A stylized, maximalist celestial forest scene, viewed from a low angle. The main subject is a symmetrical, intricate grouping of bioluminescent, fantastical flora and fauna. Elements include glowing crystal mushrooms, serpentine vines weaving between giant, stylized ferns, and miniature, glowing astral deer grazing in the undergrowth. The overall mood is magical and ethereal. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau meets Vaporwave fantasy illustration. Composition: Highly detailed, central composition, featuring strong vertical and curvilinear lines. Color Palette: Deep indigo, cosmic violet, emerald green, and accented by neon turquoise and glowing gold. Lighting: Dramatic, dramatic backlighting and rim lighting emphasize silhouettes and glow. Suitable for single-color print conversion (line art or spot colors). --ar 1:1 --style expressive --v 6.0
negative: lowres, bad anatomy, ugly, mutated, extra limbs, text, signature, watermark, blurry, noise, grain, poor details, amateur, cropped, disfigured, tiling, monochrome (unless intentional)
